distinctive_elements: Hidden Star Force song reference by Tecmo

notes: Sources provided contain no documented music tempo, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics. Wikipedia credits two composers (Tsukasa Masuko and Michiharu Hasuya) but provides no technical audio details. Data Crystal and TCRF sources focus on ROM maps, unused graphics, and regional differences rather than audio analysis. Game contains 16 levels within pyramid setting with action zones and Royal Palace rooms, but no audio documentation per area.
